chosen_action.title: Stop post-burst reset churn when live actions are already in flight

why_this_action.summary: The selector was still steering into distribution_reset even after multiple fresh external actions, active same-family pause windows, and live StackOverflow/Apollo handoff windows made another reset fake progress.

expected_outcome.primary_goal: stop the always-on marketer from inventing another reset burst immediately after several fresh external actions already shipped
expected_outcome.measurement_window: effective immediately on the next lane-selection run
expected_outcome.replacement_condition: When one of the active measurement or handoff windows materially ages or resolves, the selector can return to a genuinely executable lane.
